$comment: Phaser 3 asset index for the Sprout Lands 'Tests' folder (experimental / demo sprites by Cup Nooble). These are prototype character sheets used for testing. Paths relative to `basePath`. Frame sizes marked 'approximate' were inferred visually and should be confirmed against the accompanying .gif previews.

meta.author: Cup Nooble
meta.license: Non-commercial. No NFT/AI use. Do not redistribute/resell. Credit required.

free_character.description: Free test character (brown/mole-style) walk sheet, 8 columns of animation frames across multiple rows.
free_character.$note: Grid is 8 columns wide; frame HEIGHT is approximate (could be 16 or 24 if the sprite is taller than one tile) - verify against test .gif before committing animations.

teemo_8_directions.description: 8-direction character test ('Teemo'). 8 columns = 8 facing directions, 3 rows = animation frames per direction.

animations.$note: Column = direction (0..7), row = frame. Build a per-direction anim by taking frames [dir, dir+8, dir+16].

previews.$comment: Animated GIF previews - reference only, not meant to be loaded as game textures (Phaser cannot play multi-frame GIFs natively).

teemo_8_directions_gif.description: Animated preview of the 8-direction Teemo test.

test_character_gif.description: Animated preview of a test character (no matching static PNG in this folder).
